message: The observability note still says this replaces “three separate `console.error` calls (sequential write approach)”, but the current live handler at [preorders.ts](/Users/petercowling/base-shop/apps/prime/functions/api/firebase/preorders.ts#L124) is a single write path with one catch log at [preorders.ts](/Users/petercowling/base-shop/apps/prime/functions/api/firebase/preorders.ts#L234). The note should be tightened to match the actual baseline.
